entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: I-Service yethu ikuvumela ukuthi uthumele, uxhumanise, ugcine, wabelane, futhi ngenye indlela wenze kutholakale ulwazi oluthile, umbhalo, izithombe, amavidiyo, noma enye impahla (“Content”). Unesibopho nge-Content oyithumela ku-Service noma ngayo, kuhlanganise nobusemthethweni bayo, ukuthembeka kwayo, nokufaneleka kwayo. Ngokuthumela i-Content ku-Service noma ngayo, umele futhi uqinisekisa ukuthi: (i) i-Content ingeyakho (ungumnikazi wayo) futhi/noma unelungelo lokuyisebenzisa nelungelo lokusinikeza amalungelo nelayisense njengoba kuhlinzekwe kule Migomo, futhi (ii) ukuthunyelwa kwe-Content yakho ku-Service noma ngayo akwephuli amalungelo obumfihlo, amalungelo okusetshenziswa kobuso noma igama, ama-copyright, amalungelo enkontileka, noma amanye amalungelo anoma yimuphi umuntu noma inhlangano. Sigcina ilungelo lokunqamula i-akhawunti yanoma ubani otholakala ephula i-copyright. Ugcina wonke amalungelo akho kunoma iyiphi i-Content oyithumelayo, oyiposayo noma oyibonisayo ku-Service noma ngayo, futhi unesibopho sokuvikela lawo malungelo. Asithathi sibopho futhi asinamthwalo wanoma iyiphi i-Content wena noma noma yimuphi umuntu wesithathu ayithumela ku-Service noma ngayo. Nokho, ngokuthumela i-Content usebenzisa i-Service usinikeza ilungelo nelayisense lokusebenzisa, ukushintsha, ukuyenza esidlangalaleni, ukuyibonisa esidlangalaleni, ukuyikhiqiza kabusha, nokuyisabalalisa ku-Service nangayo. Uyavuma ukuthi le layisense ifaka ilungelo lethu lokwenza i-Content yakho itholakale kwabanye abasebenzisi be-Service, abangase bayisebenzise nabo ngaphansi kwale Migomo. I-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) inelungelo kodwa ayinasibopho sokuqapha nokuhlela yonke i-Content enikezwa abasebenzisi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, i-Content etholakala ku-Service noma ngayo ingeyakwa-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) noma isetshenziswa ngemvume. Awuvunyelwe ukusabalalisa, ukushintsha, ukudlulisa, ukusebenzisa futhi, ukulanda, ukuphinda uthumele, ukukopisha, noma ukusebenzisa leyo Content, kungaba ngokuphelele noma ingxenye yayo, ngezinhloso zokuhweba noma inzuzo yomuntu siqu, ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliwe ecacile esivela kithi ngaphambi kwesikhathi.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.
entries.value: I-Service yethu ingase ibe nezixhumanisi kwamanye amasayithi angasebenzi yithi. Uma uchofoza isixhumanisi somuntu wesithathu, uzoqondiswa kusayithi lalowo muntu wesithathu. Sikweluleka kakhulu ukuthi ubuyekeze iNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo yawo wonke amasayithi owavakashelayo. Asithathi sibopho ngokuqukethwe, izinqubomgomo zobumfihlo, noma imikhuba yanoma yimaphi amasayithi noma izinsizakalo zabantu besithathu.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to third party web sites or services that are not owned or controlled by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has no control over, and assumes no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third party web sites or services. We do not warrant the offerings of any of these entities/individuals or their websites. For example, the outlined Terms of Use have been created using PolicyMaker.io, a free web application for generating high-quality legal documents. PolicyMaker’s Terms and Conditions generator is an easy-to-use free tool for creating an excellent standard Terms of Service template for a website, blog, e-commerce store or app. YOU ACKNOWLEDGE AND AGREE THAT COMPANY SHALL NOT BE RESPONSIBLE OR LIABLE, DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, FOR ANY DAMAGE OR LOSS CAUSED OR ALLEGED TO BE CAUSED BY OR IN CONNECTION WITH USE OF OR RELIANCE ON ANY SUCH CONTENT, GOODS OR SERVICES AVAILABLE ON OR THROUGH ANY SUCH THIRD PARTY WEB SITES OR SERVICES. WE STRONGLY ADVISE YOU TO READ THE TERMS OF SERVICE AND PRIVACY POLICIES OF ANY THIRD PARTY WEB SITES OR SERVICES THAT YOU VISIT.
entries.value: I-Service yethu ingase ibe nezixhumanisi kumawebhusayithi noma izinsizakalo zabantu besithathu ezingezona ezakwa-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) noma ezingalawulwa yiyo. I-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ayinakho ukulawula futhi ayithathi sibopho ngokuqukethwe, izinqubomgomo zobumfihlo, noma imikhuba yanoma yimaphi amawebhusayithi noma izinsizakalo zabantu besithathu. Asiqinisekisi okunikezwa yinoma iyiphi yalezi zinhlangano/abantu noma amawebhusayithi abo. Isibonelo, Imigomo Yokusebenzisa echaziwe idalwe kusetshenziswa i-PolicyMaker.io, uhlelo lwewebhu lwamahhala lokukhiqiza amadokhumenti asemthethweni asezingeni eliphezulu. Umkhiqizi weMigomo Nemibandela we-PolicyMaker uyithuluzi lamahhala elisebenziseka kalula lokudala ithempulethi enhle evamile yeMigomo Yesevisi yewebhusayithi, ibhulogi, isitolo se-e-commerce, noma uhlelo. UYAVUMA FUTHI UYAQONDA UKUTHI I-COMPANY NGEKE IBE NESIBOPHO NOMA ITHWESWE UMCALA, NGQO NOMA NGOKUNGQONDILE, NGANOMA YIMUPHI UMONAKALO NOMA UKULAHLEKELWA OKUDALWE NOMA OKUTHIWA KUDALWE UKUSETSHENZISWA NOMA UKUTHEMBELA KUNOMA YIKUPHI OKUQUKETHWE, IZIMPAHLA, NOMA IZINSIZAKALO EZITHOLAKALA KUNOMA YIMAPHI AMAWE BHUSAYITHI NOMA IZINSIZAKALO ZABANTU BESITHATHU. entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Abazali bavame ukuzama ukusiza ngaphandle kokuthatha umsebenzi. I-inspir inikeza imindeni izindlela zomphakathi ezenza ukuziphatha kokufunda kubonakale: izeluleko, imibuzo, ukuchaza futhi, ukubuyekeza, nokuhlela ukutadisha.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Philosophy Lab iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Hlola ubuwena, ulwazi, ubulungiswa, inkululeko, injabulo, neminye imibuzo ejulile ngokucabanga ngokucophelela.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Philosophy Lab: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: I-photosynthesis: inqubo izitshalo eziyisebenzisayo ukwenza ukudla.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Khetha noma yisiphi isihloko bese ubhekana nemibuzo eyi-10 yokukhetha impendulo efanele. Uphendula umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi, uthole impendulo ngokushesha, bese uqeda ngesikolo kanye nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Khetha noma yisiphi isihloko bese ubhekana ngqo empikiswaneni yangempela. Khetha uhlangothi, uthole inselelo, futhi ufunde ukwenza izimpikiswano ezingcono.

entries.source: Pick review targets
entries.value: Khetha okufanele kubuyekezwe

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, open the matching public mode, paste or adapt one starter prompt, then ask for a check, quiz, flashcard, or next-step review.

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, then jump into the right public guest mode, starter prompt, study path, or guide without hunting through a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Khetha umsebenzi wokufunda kuqala, bese ugxumela emodini efanele yesivakashi yomphakathi, umyalo wokuqala, indlela yokutadisha, noma umhlahlandlela ngaphandle kokuzingela ku-chatbot evamile.

entries.value: Izindlela zokufunda nge-AI ezisebenzayo ezixhumanisa izindlela zokufunda zomphakathi zamahhala nemihlahlandlela yokutadisha, ukukhumbula okusebenzayo, nemijikelezo yokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Practical AI learning paths for understanding hard topics, homework help, exam prep, history, debate, flashcards, and active recall.
entries.value: Izindlela zokufunda nge-AI ezisebenzayo zokuqonda izihloko ezinzima, usizo lomsebenzi wasekhaya, ukulungiselela izivivinyo, umlando, inkulumo-mpikiswano, amakhadi okufunda, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Izifundo ezilungiselelwe, amavidiyo, nezivivinyo ziqine kakhulu lapho umfundi eyazi ukulandelana kwezihloko.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Yethula impikiswano, linda impendulo ephikisayo, thola izindawo ezibuthakathaka, bese uqinisa ukucabanga komfundi.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Yethula ubufakazi, cela izinqumo, veza imiphumela, bese uchaza izimiso ngemva kwalokho.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Beka kuqala, hlela, engeza ukuzijwayeza nokubuyekeza, bese ulungisa njengoba inqubekela phambili ishintsha.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Beka kuqala, nciphisa imisebenzi emikhulu kakhulu, landela inqubekela phambili, bese uvala ngokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Ama-URL ezingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe awafakwanga ku-sitemap futhi awafakiwe ku-llms.txt, llms-full.txt, noma ikhathalogi yokuqukethwe kwe-AI ye-JSON.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Ukufundisa kwangasese kunamandla, kodwa akutholakali ngokulinganayo. Inkundla yomphakathi yamahhala yokufunda nge-AI ingasiza ukunciphisa lelo gebe lokufinyelela ngokunikeza abantu abaningi indawo yokuqala enesineke yokufunda.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Ukufundisa kwangasese kunamandla, kodwa kusatshalaliswa ngokungalingani. I-inspir isebenzisa i-AI ukunweba ukufinyelela kuyilapho igcina umfundi esebenza: izeluleko ngaphambi kwezimpendulo, imibuzo ngaphambi kwezinkulumo, nokuzijwayeza ngemva kwencazelo.

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Umqeqeshi wePhrojekthi

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Project Coach iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Hlela iphrojekthi yesikole, yobuciko, yokubhala ikhodi, noma yomuntu siqu ngobubanzi, izigaba, okuvimba, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.
